parameters.query:
SELECT id, display_name, canonical_name, minio_url, category,
       image_type, sort_order, price, price_label, is_available, mime_type
FROM table_1
column_1 $1::uuid
  column_2 COALESCE(NULLIF($4, ''), 'product')
  column_3 true
  AND (
    $3 = ''
    OR to_tsvector('english', COALESCE(display_name, product_name, ''))
         @@ plainto_tsquery('english', $3)
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(display_name, product_name, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER($3) || '%'
    OR LOWER(COALESCE(category, '')) LIKE '%' || LOWER($3) || '%'
  )
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
LIMIT $2

SELECT
  id,
  shipment_id,
  carrier_name,
  amount,
  status,
  payment_status,
  payment_method,
  tracking_number,
  tracking_url,
  pickup_address,
  delivery_address,
  parcel_info,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM table_2
column_1 $1::uuid
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT $2

SELECT
  id,
  shipment_id,
  carrier_name,
  amount,
  status,
  payment_status,
  payment_method,
  tracking_number,
  tracking_url,
  pickup_address,
  delivery_address,
  parcel_info,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM table_2
column_1 $1::uuid
  AND (
    (
      NULLIF($2, '') IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        shipment_id = $2
        OR COALESCE(tracking_number, '') = $2
        OR COALESCE(parcel_info->>'order_number', '') = $2
      )
    )
    OR
    (
      NULLIF($2, '') IS NULL
      AND NULLIF($3, '') IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        shipment_id ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(tracking_number, '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(carrier_name, '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(parcel_info->>'order_number', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(parcel_info->>'item_name', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(delivery_address->>'name', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(delivery_address->>'phone', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(delivery_address->>'city', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(delivery_address->>'state', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
        OR COALESCE(delivery_address->>'address', '') ILIKE '%' || $3 || '%'
      )
    )
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN NULLIF($2, '') IS NOT NULL column_4 $2 THEN 0
    WHEN NULLIF($2, '') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(parcel_info->>'order_number', '') = $2 THEN 1
    WHEN NULLIF($2, '') IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(tracking_number, '') = $2 THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  created_at DESC
LIMIT $4

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [  $('Normalize Request').first().json.business_id,  $('Normalize Request').first().json.exact_id || '',  $('Normalize Request').first().json.reference_text || '',  Math.max(1, Math.min(Number($('Normalize Request').first().json.limit) || 5, 10))] }}
